title: NoEmotecraft Flashback Addon
description: A simple compatibility mod to make NoEmotecraft work with Flashback.
body:
# NoEmotecraft Flashback Addon

This is a simple compatibility mod that makes NoEmotecraft work with [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback). After you install the mod the replays should record and playback emotes with no additional setup required.

If you encounter any issues feel free to report them.

*This mod is heavily based on [Noemotecraft Replay Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/noemotecraft-replay-addon)*
